query: Help me turn my messy mix of notes, prompts, and agent habits into one personal workflow system.
I keep losing context between projects; where should I start with Praxis?
Can you figure out which part of my workflow OS should handle this request?
I want an AI operating model for my work, but I don't know whether I need an interview or a blueprint.
Review this new task and route it to the smallest useful Praxis capability.
My personal agent system has become sprawling; help me use the right Praxis stage to simplify it.
We need to design, install, and improve a durable workflow system without skipping approvals.
Use the Praxis lifecycle for this workflow problem and tell me the next stage.
Use praxis-interview to ask me the next question about how I work.
My profile is complete; use praxis-blueprint to draft the architecture.
The blueprint is approved; preview the Praxis setup in my vault.
Distill the Supabase decision from this finished session into a decision record.
Review last month's workflow metrics and propose one experiment.
Improve this existing Agent Skill from its failed eval outputs.
Write a short congratulations note for my teammate.
Explain how Python pathlib resolves a relative path.
